{{CargoRelic
|name=Akebono
|class_id=22030
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=10-15
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Oct 15, 1986 AD, Akebono was unearthed in Kamegaoka Heritage in Japan.<br>Akebono, a clay figure unearthed in Yamato, dates back to 4,000 years ago. It has a swollen belly and butt, a chubby body with an eddy-patterned round hat on the head. With long eyes, a pointy nose, and a small mouth, it has a pleasant look on its face. The clay contains mica which makes the figure shiny. The symbolic relic has been appointed as a national treasure of Japan.
|fame=19
|art=46
|fth=26
|civ=38
|tech=25
|ss1=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +8%
|ss2=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +16%
|ss3=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +24%
|ss4=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +40%
|ss7=In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +40%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Photonic Communicator Base Effect +40% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Demon Cells gained +2.5%
}}
